faqs.question: What pantry pests are most common in Cedarhurst homes?
faqs.answer: Cedarhurst homes most commonly experience Indian meal moths, saw-toothed grain beetles, flour beetles, and rice weevils. These pests infest dry goods like cereals, flour, pasta, nuts, and dried fruits. Our $350-$550 treatment targets all common pantry pest species and includes inspection, treatment, and prevention strategies.
